description: Worked as an IT Intern gaining practical exposure to technical systems, IT operations, and industry-level workflows.

company: Team ITJ Member — KIIT Electrical Society
description: Built robots like Track Tracer, Sand Rover, and Droid Blitz using Arduino and sensors. Improved robot functionality by tweaking code, calibrating sensors, and fixing hardware issues. Showcased projects at IIT Patna and IIT Kharagpur tech fests.
Promoted Kshitij’25 across colleges and managed participation in technical competitions and events.
Completed a structured internship focused on Java development and real-world problem-solving tasks.
